a_image.alt: Paper Stationery UI style mood board — Skeuomorphic · Stationery

sections.a_description: Thick cotton paper, faint ruled lines, a red margin stripe, and the quiet intimacy of a handwritten note on fine stationery — Paper Stationery UI translates the tactile pleasure of premium writing materials into a digital experience. Every element feels personal and considered, from the handwriting-style labels to the warm, creamy background that practically invites you to reach for a pen.

This aesthetic appears on wedding invitation sites, personal letter-writing platforms, and stationery brand e-commerce stores. You'll find it on journaling apps, calligraphy portfolio sites, pen-and-paper lifestyle blogs, and any product that celebrates the analog ritual of putting pen to paper in a digital world.

a_image_cover.alt: Paper Stationery UI style use case illustration
Paper Stationery UI style use case illustration
Paper Stationery UI style use case illustration

sections.a_description: The warm, personal feeling of fine stationery — thick cotton paper, embossed letterheads, and the quiet luxury of a well-crafted correspondence. Background: soft warm gray (#f0ebe3) with a subtle paper fiber texture. The .inner panel simulates a sheet of premium stationery: clean white (#fffefa) with a very subtle box-shadow (0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)) as if the paper is slightly lifted, and a thin left-margin rule in soft red (#e8a0a0) at 32px from the left — like a ruled notebook. Horizontal lines created via repeating-linear-gradient at 28px intervals. Warm, personal typography. Set in Lora for body text — a well-balanced serif with moderate contrast that feels like elegant personal correspondence. Caveat for the eyebrow — a handwriting font that adds the personal, pen-on-paper touch. Heading in Lora at weight 700, 28px, line-height 1.2, letter-spacing -0.3px, color #2c2420. Eyebrow in Caveat at 16px, weight 400, color #8b7355, no uppercase (feels hand-written). Body in Lora at 15px, line-height 1.7, color #3e3530. Buttons: primary — warm rose (#c0736e) background, cream text, 6px border-radius. Secondary: transparent with a warm gray border. Alternatives: Crimson Text (high-contrast serif), EB Garamond (elegant classical), Merriweather (screen-optimized serif).
